title: Kenai River King Salmon Closures Extended for 2025 – What Anglers Need to Know
summary: The Alaska Department of Fish and Game (ADF&G) has announced another year of closures for Kenai River king salmon fishing , marking the third consecutive year of restrictions . With forecasted returns at near-record lows , ADF&G is taking action to protect dwindling king salmon stocks across Cook Inlet . title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent:  February 23, 2026
summary: February 23, 2026: The Arctic Sea ice has experienced a slight decrease of 0.14% for the week. This is a change from 14.206 M km2 on February 16 th to 14.186 M km2.
